detaileddescription.para: user data for SAX interface, defaults to the context itself
non-zero for HTML documents, actually an htmlInsertMode
The main document URI, if available, with its last component stripped.
Set if DTD content is parsed.

xrefdescription.para: Use the name argument of the internalSubset SAX callback or xmlCtxtGetDocTypeDecl

detaileddescription.para: Name of the internal subset (root element type).

xrefdescription.para: Use the systemId argument of the internalSubset SAX callback or xmlCtxtGetDocTypeDecl

detaileddescription.para: System identifier (URI) of external the subset.

xrefdescription.para: Use the publicId argument of the internalSubset SAX callback or xmlCtxtGetDocTypeDecl

detaileddescription.para: This member is MISNAMED. It contains the public identifier of the external subset.
For user data, libxml won't touch it

xrefdescription.para: Use xmlParserOption XML_PARSE_DTDLOAD, XML_PARSE_DTDATTR or XML_PARSE_SKIP_IDS.

detaileddescription.para: Control loading of the external subset and handling of IDs. Other options like validate can override this value.

listitem.para: 0: The default behavior is to process IDs and to ignore the external subset.
XML_DETECT_IDS: Load external subset. This flag is misnamed. ID handling is only controlled by XML_SKIP_IDS.
XML_COMPLETE_ATTRS: Load external subset and process default attributes.

xrefdescription.para: Use xmlParserOption XML_PARSE_RECOVER run in recovery mode

detaileddescription.para: is the document XML Namespace okay
Use dictionary names for the tree
the complete error information for the last error.
